title: phleum pratense var. stoloniferum
intro: Phleum pratense var. stoloniferum, also known as creeping timothy grass, is a variety of grass that is commonly found in meadows and pastures. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phleum pratense var. stoloniferum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial activity. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
